title: Nibble Bits
description: A simple resource pack that redesigns some of Minecraft's blocks and mobs.
body:
## What is Nibble Bits?
Nibble Bits is a simple little resourcepack that changes some textures from both Vanilla Minecraft and a couple mods ([Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), & [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)).
Textures like Dragon's Breath, Glow Berries, & Copper have been remade entirely.
## Example of texture changes
![item texture changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YE0mTT26/images/403929324c53796f4052a88835b8d7ffe9140eda.png)
![House made of mud and copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YE0mTT26/images/558b62c6dbde717010f2fb99859fc01d1a5e1d33.png)
